groups.thesis_breaker: S&P 500 correction below 6859 (10% off 7621 high). Momentum breakdown if avg RSI drops below 40 (currently 50). Trend weakening — 1/3 (33%) already below 50-day MA, critical if >50%. Group leadership fragile (avg YTD -2.4%), at risk of turning negative.
